name: Claribel Alegría
bio: Clara Isabel Alegría Vides, also known by her pseudonym Claribel Alegría, was a Nicaraguan-Salvadoran poet, essayist, novelist, and journalist who was a major voice in the literature of contemporary Central America. She was awarded the 2006 Neustadt International Prize for Literature.

awards.name: Orden al Mérito Docente y Cultural Gabriela Mistral
Commander of the Order of the Star of Italian Solidarity
Chevalier des Arts et des Lettres
